_docs: defaultDays: null means indefinite retention. requireHumanReviewBeforeDeletion: true means Iris will gate deletion behind explicit user confirmation. autoHoldOnCreate: true means records are placed on accountability hold automatically and cannot be purged without deliberate action.

institutional_decision.description: Records of specific decisions made by named public officials — police officers, council officers, LGO staff, named individuals in institutions. Held indefinitely by default. Named human review required before any deletion.

accountability_evidence.description: Records explicitly flagged by the user as important for legal, FOI, complaint, or historical accountability purposes. Held indefinitely by default. Named human review required before any deletion.

personal_sensitive.description: Health information, disability status, personal communications. Default retention 2 years (730 days). Human review required before deletion even after retention period expires.

model_context.description: Normal conversation history and temporary AI outputs. Purged automatically after 90 days unless the user places a hold.

system_log.description: Iris internal audit logs and system events. Purged automatically after 30 days.
